title: Resume
summary: This resume outlines Vihaan Khare's academic background, project experience in AI/ML and full-stack development, and leadership role in a student club. It highlights strong technical skills across various programming languages and frameworks, demonstrating a proactive approach to learning and applying technology.

children.title: Education
children.summary: This section details Vihaan Khare's academic qualifications, including a B.Tech in Information Technology and Higher Secondary Certificate.

children.title: B.Tech in Information Technology
children.summary: Currently pursuing a B.Tech in Information Technology at Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, with an impressive CGPA of 8.93. This ongoing degree demonstrates a strong academic foundation in core IT principles and advanced technical concepts.

children.title: Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC)
children.summary: Completed Higher Secondary Certificate from Aditya English Medium School in 2024. This foundational education provided a strong base for further academic pursuits in information technology.

children.title: Experience
children.summary: This section highlights Vihaan Khare's experience as a Sponsorship Secretary, demonstrating leadership and negotiation skills within a technical club.

children.title: Sponsorship Secretary
children.summary: As Sponsorship Secretary for the Tech to Product Innovation Club, Vihaan spearheaded negotiations to secure corporate backing for technical events. This role involved cultivating industry partnerships over 4 months to drive essential resources for student initiatives, showcasing strong interpersonal and strategic planning skills.

children.title: Skills
children.summary: This section lists Vihaan Khare's diverse technical skills, encompassing programming languages, frameworks, databases, and machine learning tools.

children.title: C
children.summary: Proficient in C, demonstrating foundational programming knowledge and ability to work with low-level system operations. This skill underpins understanding of data structures and algorithms.

children.title: C++
children.summary: Skilled in C++, capable of developing high-performance applications and implementing complex object-oriented designs. This proficiency is crucial for competitive programming and system-level development.

children.title: Java
children.summary: Competent in Java, enabling development of robust, scalable, and enterprise-level applications. This includes understanding of JVM, multithreading, and various Java frameworks.

children.title: Python
children.summary: Highly proficient in Python, utilized for scripting, data analysis, machine learning, and backend development. This versatility allows for rapid prototyping and complex algorithmic implementations.

children.title: Dart
children.summary: Experienced with Dart, primarily for developing cross-platform mobile applications using the Flutter framework. This includes understanding of asynchronous programming and state management.

children.title: JavaScript
children.summary: Adept in JavaScript, essential for both frontend interactivity and backend server-side logic. This skill is foundational for modern web development across various frameworks.

children.title: React.js
children.summary: Skilled in React.js, used for building dynamic and responsive user interfaces with a component-based architecture. This enables efficient development of single-page applications.

children.title: Node.js
children.summary: Proficient in Node.js, utilized for building scalable and high-performance backend services and APIs. This includes expertise in asynchronous programming and event-driven architectures.

children.title: Express.js
children.summary: Experienced with Express.js, a minimalist web framework for Node.js, used to build robust RESTful APIs and web applications. This facilitates rapid backend development and routing.

children.title: Flutter
children.summary: Skilled in Flutter, enabling the development of natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase. This includes UI/UX design and state management.

children.title: MongoDB
children.summary: Proficient in MongoDB, a NoSQL database, for flexible and scalable data storage and retrieval. This includes schema design, indexing, and aggregation pipelines.

children.title: MySQL
children.summary: Experienced with MySQL, a relational database management system, for structured data storage and complex querying. This includes database design, normalization, and SQL optimization.

children.title: Firebase
children.summary: Skilled in Firebase, a comprehensive mobile and web application development platform, for backend services like authentication, real-time database, and cloud functions. This accelerates development and scales applications.

children.title: Git
children.summary: Proficient in Git for version control, enabling collaborative development, code management, and tracking changes effectively. This ensures robust and organized project workflows.

children.title: GitHub
children.summary: Experienced with GitHub for hosting and managing code repositories, facilitating collaboration, code reviews, and project management. This platform is essential for open-source contributions and team projects.

children.title: REST APIs
children.summary: Adept at designing, developing, and consuming RESTful APIs for seamless communication between client and server applications. This ensures efficient data exchange and integration.

children.title: Socket.io
children.summary: Skilled in Socket.io for building real-time, bidirectional, and event-based communication applications. This enables features like live chat, notifications, and real-time data updates.

children.title: JWT Authentication
children.summary: Experienced in implementing JWT (JSON Web Token) authentication for securing APIs and web applications. This ensures secure user sessions and controlled access to resources.

children.title: TensorFlow.js
children.summary: Proficient in TensorFlow.js for deploying and training machine learning models directly in the browser or Node.js. This enables client-side AI capabilities and real-time inference.

children.title: MediaPipe
children.summary: Skilled in MediaPipe for building cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media. This includes capabilities for face detection, pose estimation, and object tracking.

children.title: OpenCV
children.summary: Experienced with OpenCV for computer vision tasks, including image processing, object detection, and video analysis. This is crucial for developing advanced visual recognition systems.

children.title: Scikit-Learn
children.summary: Proficient in Scikit-Learn for machine learning, including classification, regression, clustering, and dimensionality reduction. This enables rapid development and deployment of predictive models.

children.title: Pandas
children.summary: Skilled in Pandas for data manipulation and analysis in Python, including data cleaning, transformation, and aggregation. This is essential for preparing data for machine learning models.

children.title: NumPy
children.summary: Experienced with NumPy for numerical computing in Python, particularly for array operations and mathematical functions. This provides a high-performance foundation for scientific computing and data science.

children.title: Projects
children.summary: This section showcases Vihaan Khare's diverse project portfolio, demonstrating expertise in AI/ML, full-stack development, and real-time systems.

children.title: AI Proctored Online Examination System
children.summary: Vihaan engineered an event-driven backend architecture utilizing WebSockets, integrating TensorFlow.js and MediaPipe for real-time monitoring and managing concurrent user sessions. The system featured scalable MongoDB collections to handle high-frequency data operations, ensuring reliable state logging, accurate live timers, and automated submission workflows for online examinations.

children.title: Cab Booking Platform
children.summary: Vihaan engineered the backend logic and relational database schemas for a robust ride-booking system, efficiently mapping, storing, and querying complex data flows between user requests, vehicles, and driver availability. The platform implemented secure REST APIs and WebSocket connections to handle continuous data streaming, active ride tracking, and asynchronous event synchronization, ensuring a smooth user experience.

children.title: Nifty Market Trend Predictor
children.summary: Vihaan architected a sophisticated time-series forecasting pipeline using LSTM and ensemble networks, implementing robust TimeSeriesSplit logic to manage complex sequential arrays and prevent data leakage. The algorithmic performance was optimized for highly imbalanced datasets using AdaBoost to capture rare minority class events, achieving a significant 93.73% cross-validation directional accuracy.

children.title: Transformer Maintenance Management App
children.summary: Vihaan built an industry-sponsored asset tracking application using Flutter, applying object-oriented Dart principles to manage application state and digitize complex field workflows. The app orchestrated asynchronous data synchronization with Cloud Firestore to handle real-time location tracking, maintenance logs, and enforce strict role-based access rules, providing a comprehensive solution for asset management.

children.title: EchoSoul Project
children.summary: Vihaan architected a client-server application, integrating a Python/FastAPI backend with a Node.js frontend to dynamically generate custom AI personality profiles. The project engineered complex data workflows to process file uploads, manage asynchronous Google Gemini API calls, and execute text-to-speech audio conversions, earning recognition as a Top 20 Finalist out of 250 teams in Sociothon 2025.
